text: Hi sweetheart, just thinking about you 💛 how are you doing?
Aw Gran I'm good! Busy with work but managing. How are you feeling?
Oh I'm keeping well love, had a cuppa with Jean next door this morning 😊 don't work too hard now!
Hey sweetheart, just wanted to check in 🙂 how are you doing?
Good thanks mum! just got back from work, super tired but all good 😊 how about you?
Aw glad to hear it! I'm fine love, dad and I were just thinking about you. Call us soon xx
Hey sweetheart, just checking in 😊 how's everything going with you?
Hii Dad!! all good here, been pretty busy with work but managing 😅 how are you and Mum?
We're great! Mum made your favourite lasagne tonight, wish you were here 🥰 call us soon yeah?
girllll it's been forever!! how are you doing?? feels like we haven't talked since like march lol
i knowww i'm so sorry life has been so crazy 😩 but honestly pretty good!! just been working a lot. miss you though!!
ugh same we need to actually plan something soon, none of this 'we should hang out' talk lmao are you free any weekend this month?
Hey Grace! Just thinking about you — how are things going? 😊
Lorraine!! So good to hear from you 🥹 honestly been a bit overwhelmed but managing. Miss our chats
Aw I'm here whenever you need!! Let's catch up properly soon, maybe a quick call this week? ☕
hey grace, random q — do you remember what time the standup is tomorrow? i deleted the calendar invite by accident 😅
haha classic, it's 9:30! don't be late again lol
you're a lifesaver, thank you!! setting 3 alarms just in case 😂
Hi sweetheart, just thinking about you 💛 how are you doing?
Aw Gran I'm good! Busy with work but managing. How are you feeling?
You still coming Sunday sweetheart? I have the log cabin top laid out.
Yes Grandma, noon like always. Bringing the good bread.
Bring a warm sweater. Kitchen's drafty this morning.
Some of those good tomatoes if you pass Cedarbrook.
Betty at church gave me a whole bin of feed sack cotton. I saved the blues for you.
Perfect for the memorial piece. Thank you.
Are you eating enough Grace. You looked thin last time.
I'm eating. Emma is making sure.
You need to slow down at that firm. Rest is medicine.
I know Grandma. Sunday's a rest day for us both.
Sunday lunch — chicken and dumplings this week?
Yes please. I'll make the biscuits from your recipe.
Careful on the drive up. Fog on the pass.
How's the coalition case going Gracie?
Slow but we filed the motion this week. Good.
Bring your camera Sunday. I want a picture with the log cabin top.
Are the girls still in the championship?
Semifinal on 10/3. Come watch if you feel up to it.
I'll try love. Depends on the walker.
No pressure. I'll send a highlight reel.
She'll try — depends on her shift.
Warm the biscuits ten minutes at 350.
Dad's cardiologist appointment is the 22nd. Please talk to him.
Community Action sent two families your way. Housing.
Ruth had a bad night. Nothing serious but check in.
Your father's diabetes numbers were up. He's not tracking.
The walker fitting is 8/12. I'll take her.
Motion filed. Judge granted the TRO for Wilson.
Good. Don't work through Sunday again.
Garden's coming in — corn and tomatoes for you next weekend.
Ruth wants chicken and dumplings for lunch Sunday.
Your sister's shift got moved. She might not make it.
Bring the good bread from Recess. Ruth loves it.
Deer meat in the freezer for you.
Fishing report — good stripers at the reservoir.
Not this weekend but tell me next time.
Your grandfather's watch is fixed. Come by.
Coalition thing — heard about it on the radio. Proud of you.
Truck needs new tires. Not urgent.
Bring your grandmother out to the porch Sunday. Nice weather.
Yes. Your place. I'll bring wine.
Mom called about Ruth. All good?
Shift got moved to Saturday. Can't do Green Lakes.
I hung the shelf. Come see it.
Dad is being weird about the cardiologist thing.
Ruth's birthday — dinner at the farm? Small.
Yes. Chicken and dumplings. You bring pie.
Long. TRO granted for Wilson though.
You look tired in the last selfie.
Museum piece — how's the borders going?
Flying geese, muted cottons. Coming together.
Kids look strong. Semifinal in 3 weeks.
Zoning board — vent when I see you.
Isbell tickets — Aug 22 fairgrounds. In or out?
Clark Reservation better this time of year.
Yes. Two blocks — install then game reps.
Overflow lot behind the field house. Send it.
Uniform order — same as last year?
Cones missing after Monday. Down to 20.
Scouted the Panthers. Weak-side collapse confirmed.
Championship prep — full game reps ok Wk8?
Yes. And rotate through the wings.
Field 4. Parking overflow behind field house.
Please return signed medical consent forms.
Uniform order closes Friday. Sizes needed.
Snack rotation for Saturday — Wilsons up.
Water bottles at practice. It's hot.
Photo release consent — need 3 more back.
Coach Maya running Monday — I'm in court.
End of season awards nominations open.
Great effort Saturday. See film Sunday.
Reminder — championship 10/10 tentative if we advance.
Season photos posted to shared folder.
Sunday lunch confirmed at Ruth's — noon.
Dad grabbing eggs on the way.
Mom bringing tomatoes from the garden.
Bring the log cabin top. She wants to work after lunch.
